title: Savory Turkish Tofu Kebabs
description: A quick, creamy, and slightly sweet vegan kebab with a Turkish twist, cooked in a cast‑iron skillet.
instructions: Press tofu for 30 minutes to remove excess moisture.
Toss tofu cubes with soy sauce, lemon juice, garlic powder, smoked paprika, cumin, sea salt, black pepper, powdered sugar, and crushed red pepper flakes until evenly coated.
Let tofu marinate for 15 minutes while stirring occasionally.
Heat a cast‑iron skillet over medium‑high heat and add olive oil.
Place marinated tofu strips in a single layer, cooking for 3 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Reduce heat to medium, add tahini to the pan, and swirl to coat tofu, cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
Use a slotted spoon to transfer tofu to a plate and discard excess oil.
Serve hot with fresh tomato salad or pita bread.
Garnish with chopped parsley and an extra squeeze of lemon juice if desired.
